title: Hallmark Chain Risk Score
description: Layer 0 — Chain Risk Score (CRS). Schema for /public/scores/chains/*.yaml. Introduced in methodology v4.0. Captures chain-level risk (consensus, sequencer, operational maturity, bridge architecture, VM). Integrates into L3 GRS via the existing Multi-Protocol Rule as an additional dependency.

methodology_version.description: Hallmark methodology version used (v4.0+ for chain assessments)

crs.description: Chain Risk Score, 1-10 scale (lower = lower risk)

criteria.description: Composition breakdown — N1 to N5 scores (Network criteria)

n1.description: Consensus & Decentralization (weight 25%) — validator count, BFT threshold, finality, slashing

n2.description: Sequencer Architecture (weight 20%) — centralization, force-exit, censorship resistance

n3.description: Operational Track Record (weight 20%) — age, uptime, halts, recoveries

n4.description: Bridge Architecture (weight 15%) — canonical bridge multisig, audit coverage, attack surface

n5.description: VM Maturity (weight 20%) — VM novelty, runtime audits, formal verification, known bugs
